title: rubus adauctus
intro: Rubus adauctus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus adauctus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Rubus adauctus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
